title: Coconut Cream Pudding
description: A rich and creamy dessert made with coconut milk, perfect for satisfying your sweet tooth. This recipe is free from animal products, making it suitable for vegans.

ingredients.name: Non-dairy milk
ingredients.notes: Such as almond or soy milk

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the coconut milk and non-dairy milk.
Add the sugar and stir until dissolved.
Add the dreamy creamy pudding mix and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 3 hours or until set.
Just before serving, drizzle with coconut oil.
Garnish with toasted coconut flakes or shredded coconut, if desired.
Note: If using a pudding mix that requires cooking, do so according to package instructions.
If using individual serving cups, you can garnish with toasted coconut flakes or shredded coconut before serving.
